Dear subscriber,

If you can read this but the rest of this message looks like nonsense, it's
probably because your e-mail program cannot read messages sent in HTML
format. Unfortunately, we are no longer able to send Streetmail out in
plain-text format.

We'd love to be able to deliver our fully-functional, full-color Streetmail to you!
Would you consider upgrading your e-mail client at your ISP? Or signing up for Streetmail 
through a free web-based e-mail account (such as Hotmail or Yahoo) that is more HTML compatible?

We apologize for the inconvenience, and we hope to see you back at
Streetmail sometime soon.
